positive: A hyper-detailed, symmetrical mandala-style composition featuring mystical forest creatures (deer, fox, owl) intertwined with stylized celestial elements like crescent moons, stars, and nebula swirls. The style should be deep linework illustration mixed with art nouveau bioluminescence. High contrast, strong silhouettes, and intricate geometric patterns filling the entire frame. Limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and antique gold on a neutral background. Ideal for a clean, centered apparel print, vector illustration quality, highly detailed, sacred geometry, symmetry, forest core, fantasy wildlife art.
